codes.BACKEND_METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED: Backend endpoint exists but does not accept this request.

codes.MULTIPLE_TENANTS: Multiple tenants found. Please 선택 a tenant.
codes.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session expired. 로그인 again 로 계속.
codes.USER_EXISTS: This 이메일 is already registered. Please sign in instead.
codes.AI_UNAUTHORIZED: AI API key invalid 또는 expired

codes.ADMISSION_VALIDATION_FAILED: Some 필수 admission details are missing. Please 검토 highlighted fields.
codes.ADMISSION_RECOMMENDATION_FAILED: Unable 로 generate clinical recommendations right now. You can still 검토 및 저장 admission.

capture.identifierWarning: Identifier-like text was detected. It is not included in structured 검토 payload.
capture.trainingApprovalAvailable: Training approval controls remain in governed 검토 workflows.

privacy.title: 개인정보
privacy.localStorageDescription: Preferences 및 session data are stored only on this device. 없음:thing is sent 로 external servers.
privacy.optionalAI: If 온라인 AI features are enabled, those requests may be sent 로 configured services.

about.title: 정보
about.prototypeScope: This is a prototype 용 reference 및 training. 없음:t 용 clinical use.

safety.title: Clinical safety
safety.body: AI Vent provides documentation support 및 advisory safety prompts only. It does not replace clinical judgment, issue treatment orders, 또는 determine 인공호흡기 설정.
safety.secondary: Confirm all decisions against 환자, your 시설 workflow, 및 local clinical protocol.
safety.acknowledgeLabel: I understand this is advisory decision support only
safety.acknowledgeHint: 필수 before continuing 로 clinical workflows
safety.syncDeferred: Safety acknowledgement is saved on this device 및 will be 동기화됨 when backend authentication is available.

clinicalSafety.title: Use as advisory support
clinicalSafety.body: 검토 safety note before using AI Vent. app can highlight missing data 및 uncertainty, but a qualified clinician remains responsible 용 환자 care decisions.

facilityWorkflow.title: Stay in 시설 context
facilityWorkflow.body: Use active 시설 및 역할 shown by your session. Keep records within correct 시설 workflow 및 follow local escalation, 검토, 및 approval procedures.

inputs.title: 입력:ing inputs
inputs.body: Use 입원 등록 로 입력: available clinical parameters (SpO2, PaO2, PaCO2, pH, respiratory rate, etc.). 선택 사항 ABG values improve confidence when available, but missing 선택 사항 data should be reviewed as uncertainty rather than treated as a 저장 blocker.

recommendations.title: Interpreting recommendations
recommendations.body: Recommendations 표시 advisory 인공호흡기 setting references 포함 a confidence tier. Match quality reflects how well dataset cases align 포함 your inputs. Use matched cases as reference only 및 verify against clinical judgment.

monitoring.title: 모니터링 및 alerts
monitoring.body: After reviewing a 권장 사항, use 모니터링 로 log vitals 및 labs over time. Alerts highlight values outside set thresholds 및 should be assessed according 로 local protocol.

offline.title: 오프라인 behavior
offline.body: Core workflow (입원 등록, advisory summaries, 모니터링) works 오프라인. Data is saved locally. 선택 사항 AI features require connectivity. When 뒤로 온라인, 계속 as 정상.

glossary.PEEP: Positive end-expiratory pressure (cmH₂O). Maintains lung volume 및 oxygenation.
glossary.FiO2: Fraction of inspired oxygen (0–1). Percentage of oxygen in inspired gas.
glossary.IERatio: I:E ratio. Inspiratory 로 expiratory time ratio (e.g. 1:2).
glossary.tidalVolume: 일회 호흡량 (mL). Volume delivered per breath.
glossary.PaCO2: Partial pressure of arterial carbon dioxide (mmHg).
glossary.ABG: Arterial blood gas values such as PaO2, PaCO2, 및 pH, tied 로 a sample time.
glossary.referenceStatus: Governance 및 verification state 용 a reference range. Only active approved 또는 verified ranges are eligible 용 active decision-support display.
glossary.datasetCapture: Candidate de-identified records that need 검토 before dataset 또는 training use.
glossary.reviewQueue: A work queue 용 검토 decisions, corrections, exclusions, 및 audit reasons.
glossary.syncState: Current 오프라인, 온라인, 또는 syncing state. Clinical records may still need later sync.
glossary.shadowMode: Governed model evaluation mode where outputs remain hidden 에서 정상 clinical workflows.

missingABG.title: Missing ABG values
missingABG.body: Recommendations work without ABG; 입력: SpO₂ 및 기타 vitals when available. 용 better matching, 추가 PaO₂, PaCO₂, 및 pH when you have them.

offline.title: Using app 오프라인
offline.body: 입원 등록, advisory summaries, 및 모니터링 work 오프라인. Data is stored locally. 선택 사항 AI suggestions require internet. Sync is not 필수 용 core workflow.

unverifiedReference.title: Reference range is not active
unverifiedReference.body: Draft, 대기 중, retired, rejected, 및 unverified ranges are not eligible 용 active decision-support display. 검토 source, version, scope, 및 verification status.

roleRestrictedModelHelp.title: Model-readiness 도움말 is restricted
roleRestrictedModelHelp.body: Predictive model readiness 및 shadow-mode details are visible only 로 approved governance roles. 없음:rmal clinical workflows do not expose model internals.

needsReview.title: Record needs 검토
needsReview.body: Use 검토 queue 로 check submitted data, request correction, 승인 eligible records, 또는 제외 records 포함 an audit 사유.

guides.home: 검토 시설 context, sync state, active admissions, red flags, 및 records needing 검토 before opening a 환자 workflow.
guides.admit: Capture 환자 pathway 및 available clinical values. Mark unavailable data clearly 및 검토 backend-confirmed calculations after 저장.
guides.tracking: Use 추적 로 scan recent ventilation status 및 검토 needs. Read trend flags 포함 source data 및 local protocol context.
guides.abgVentUpdate: Add new ABG results and ventilator settings as time-stamped records so earlier values remain available for review.
guides.datasetCapture: Use dataset capture 용 de-identified candidate records. Human 검토 is 필수 before approved training-data use.
guides.reviewQueue: Use 검토 queue 로 승인, request correction, 또는 제외 records while preserving audit trail.
guides.dashboard: Use dashboards 용 aggregate quality, 검토, reference, 및 governance status. Avoid 환자 identifiers in governance summaries.
guides.settings: Use 설정 용 계정, 시설, accessibility, 개인정보, sync, 및 reference visibility preferences where authorized.
guides.hypoxemia: 검토 FiO₂ 및 PEEP; consider recruitment; check 용 shunt 또는 V/Q mismatch.
guides.hypercapnia: 검토 minute ventilation (rate × tidal volume); consider permissive hypercapnia per protocol.
guides.acidosis: Address ventilation 및 perfusion; correct underlying cause per protocol.
guides.general: Use recommendations as decision support only. Validate against local protocols 및 clinical judgment.

ai.label: AI 의사결정 지원
ai.enableHint: Use 온라인 AI 용 complex cases only; local recommendations always available
ai.providerHint: AI provider (e.g. OpenAI); API key is per provider

patientReason.description: Capture 환자 pathway, 나이, body metrics, 및 사유 용 support.

oxygenAbgVentilator.description: Record current oxygen support, observation time, oxygenation, vital signs, available ABG values, 및 uncertain values. 인공호흡기 설정 are suggested on 다음 step 에서 dataset.
oxygenAbgVentilator.oxygenSupportHint: Choose support 환자 is receiving when these values are measured.
oxygenAbgVentilator.timeHint: Use local date 및 time 용 observation.

saveReview.suggestedSettingsHint: Prefilled from the dataset using patient biodata and the current oxygen and ABG values. Edit only when the bedside decision differs.
saveReview.recommendationEmpty: 입력: clinical values 및 tap 다음 로 generate a dataset 권장 사항.

saveReview.clinicianConfirmed: Clinician confirms this admission record is ready 용 저장 검토.

observations.title: Additional observations
observations.description: Record any extra clinical data not covered above (e.g. labs, imaging, medications, comorbidity scores). Each observation is a single 이름–value pair. 선택 사항; you can skip this step.
observations.name: 이름

timeSeries.title: Time series (vital signs over time)
timeSeries.description: Track vital signs 또는 기타 metrics at multiple time points (e.g. SpO₂, RR, HR at 0h, 1h, 2h). Used 용 trend analysis 및 모니터링 after you start session. 선택 사항; you can 추가 points later on 모니터링 screen.
